{{Quote|Did Captain Pellaeon send you? I'm Lt. Brytok.|Errad Brytok|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Errad Brytok''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], and a [[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant Major]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he was second in command to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], aboard the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']].

==Behind the scenes==
Errad Brytok was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]]. The game was shut down on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. Although not mentioned in the quest dialogue, examining Brytok (identified as Lt. Errad Brytok in the game) revealed him to also be a Sergeant Major. As Errad Brytok was repeatedly identified as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], this additional rank of sergeant major displayed in the examination window was likely a result of game mechanics, and may or may not be [[canon]]. It may not have been impossible, however, for Errad Brytok to have held the additional rank of sergeant major in another branch of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Military]], such as the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]].
